statement: A uniform solid cylinder of mass 8 kg and radius 0.25 m rolls without slipping on a horizontal surface. A horizontal force P = 40 N is applied at the center of the cylinder. Find the linear acceleration of the center and the friction force at the contact point. I_G = ½·m·r².
common_student_errors: Assuming no friction is needed because the surface is horizontal (friction is required to enforce rolling without slipping)
Forgetting the rolling constraint when writing the moment equation: α = a/r
Applying P and friction in the same direction rather than recognizing friction opposes slip at the contact
